SummonerFlash.name: Flash
SummonerFlash.description: Teleports your champion a short distance toward your cursor's location.

SummonerDot.name: Ignite
SummonerDot.description: Ignites target enemy champion, dealing 70-410 true damage over 5 seconds and reducing healing effects.

SummonerTeleport.name: Teleport
SummonerTeleport.description: After channeling for 4 seconds, teleports your champion to target allied structure.

SummonerSmite.name: Smite
SummonerSmite.description: Deals 600-1200 true damage to target monster or minion.

SummonerHeal.name: Heal
SummonerHeal.description: Restores 80-318 Health and grants 30% Movement Speed for 1 second to you and target allied champion.

SummonerExhaust.name: Exhaust
SummonerExhaust.description: Exhausts target enemy champion, reducing their Movement Speed by 30% and their damage dealt by 35% for 3 seconds.
